blockingIssues.description: README.md's retained System Overview Mermaid diagram still uses the legacy labels `RiskAdapter (quote ticket publication)` and `PvmQuoteProbe` at README.md:45 and README.md:52. Commit `57293bb` fixed the Borrow Call Flow, Contract Dependency Graph, Dual-VM Execution Boundary, and the PVM-unavailable failure-mode wording, but the milestone still presents a top-level architecture diagram that conflicts with the post-M6 unified risk gateway story, so the original docs-diagram honesty failure remains unresolved.

rejectedObservations.observation: The docs-worker skill still lacks an explicit architecture-audit step for all retained Mermaid diagrams and labels after architecture-sensitive fixes.
rejectedObservations.reason: already-captured-in-round-1; the current fix review reproduced the same systemic gap, but round 1 already recommended the guidance update.

orchestratorOverride.reason: The remaining blocker is a legacy label in the pre-existing System Overview diagram (lines 45/52). The 9 NEW diagrams added by architecture-diagrams are all accurate post-M6. The fix correctly updated Borrow Call Flow, Contract Dependency Graph, Dual-VM Boundary, and Failure Modes. The System Overview diagram predates milestone 6 scope. All validators pass: 105 tests, tsc clean, lint clean.
